title: Navgator Config
description: Configuration file for navgator path indexing and static items.

$schema.title: Schema URL
$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URL for editor autocompletion and validation.

paths.title: Paths
paths.description: Path collection settings used to build the navigation list.

ui.title: UI
ui.description: User interface color and display settings.

ConfigPaths.title: Path Settings
ConfigPaths.description: Groups of folders that navgator indexes or always includes.

index_folders.title: Index Folders
index_folders.description: Directories to index; each directory and its direct child directories are included.

static_items.title: Static Items
static_items.description: Directories or files to include as-is without indexing children.

ConfigPreview.title: Preview Settings
ConfigPreview.description: Settings for preview and worktree preview tabs.

selected_worktree_tab_min_chars.title: Selected Worktree Tab Minimum Characters
selected_worktree_tab_min_chars.description: Minimum label characters to keep before the ellipsis for the selected worktree preview tab. Defaults to 10.

shorten_worktree_tab_labels.title: Shorten Worktree Tab Labels
shorten_worktree_tab_labels.description: When true, worktree tab labels use only the segment after the last slash, for example feat/yarden/potato becomes potato. Defaults to true.

worktree_tab_min_chars.title: Worktree Tab Minimum Characters
worktree_tab_min_chars.description: Minimum label characters to keep before the ellipsis for non-selected worktree preview tabs. Defaults to 6.

ConfigRemote.title: Remote Settings
ConfigRemote.description: Settings for remote branch discovery and caching.

enabled_by_default.title: Enabled By Default
enabled_by_default.description: When true, remote branch mode starts enabled for the initially selected project. Defaults to false.

refresh_on_toggle.title: Refresh On Toggle
refresh_on_toggle.description: When true, enabling remote branch mode runs a background ls-remote refresh. Defaults to true.

use_cache.title: Use Cache
use_cache.description: When true, cached remote branches are shown before local refs and background refresh. Defaults to true.

default.title: Default Sort
default.description: Initial result sort mode. Defaults to modified-desc.

pin_current_project.title: Pin Current Project
pin_current_project.description: When true, the current Git worktree/project is pinned to the first row for empty searches. Defaults to true.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Color theme to use. Defaults to auto.
